message:
Running command: 
# 147 min CPU / 39 min elapsed. VmRSS STILL exactly 5039224 kB
# The VmRSS not changing at all for multiple checks is suspicious
# Let me check if we're reading a stale /proc value
ORPID=956540
echo "=== Process check with multiple reads ==="
for i in 1 2 3; do
    vmrss=$(grep VmRSS /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
    cpu_time=$(ps -o cputime= -p $ORPID 2>/dev/null)
    echo "  Read $i: VmRSS=$vmrss kB, CPU=$(ps -p $ORPID -o %cpu= 2>/dev/null)%, TIME=$cpu_time"
    sleep 2
done

echo ""
echo "=== Check /proc/$ORPID/smaps_rollup ==="
cat /proc/$ORPID/smaps_rollup 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""  
echo "=== syscall state ==="
cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -3

function.name: execute_bash
